rulings.Case Title: NARCISO S HILO III VS. FIRST FINANCIAL LENDER et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 22, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANTS MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., CITIBANK, N.A., AS TRUSTEE FOR CERTIFICATEHOLDERS ASSET MORTGAGE INVESTMENTS, INC., BEAR STERNS ALT-A TRUST, MORTGAGE PASS- THROUGH CERTIFICATES, SERIES 2007-2, EMC MORTGAGE LLC, FORMERLY KNOWN AS EMC MORTGAGE CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO 5TH AMENDED COMPLAINT Hearing required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOE N WAGNER VS. NELVIDA TAYLOR
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 22, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT NELVIDA TAYLOR'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAIN without leave to amend. Notice is fatally defective. No telephone number / time available to receive payment. CCP 1161(2) = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LEONORA MEUSEL VS. ADDIE JUANITA COVELL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant To Appear For Oral Deposition
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 22, 2013, line 3. PLAINTIFF LEONORA MEUSEL'S Motion To Compel Defendant To Appear For Oral Deposition Off calendar. Failed to comply with SFLR 2.6.B. = (501/REQ)
